projectDescription: PRIZM is a data quality and observability platform by DQLabs that lets teams monitor assets, track metrics, manage alerts, and resolve data issues across their data ecosystem.
keyFeatures: Unified asset catalog — discover and browse tables, views, queries, pipelines, reports, and semantic models across all connected databases
Data quality metrics — real-time monitoring of data quality score, freshness, volume, schema, and completeness
Alerts — automated notifications for data drift, threshold breaches, pipeline failures, and schema changes with severity levels (Critical, High, Warning, Info)
Issues tracker — create, triage, and resolve data quality issues with priority and status workflow
Asset detail view — per-asset tabs for Overview, Schema, Metrics, Lineage, and Documentation
Analytics dashboard — query performance, cache hit rate, error rate, and active-user insights
AI Chat Assistant — natural-language interface to query pipeline status, current alerts, and asset health
Search — global asset search with keyboard shortcut and type-filtered tabs (All, Tables & Views, Query, Pipeline, Reports, Semantics)
Dark mode toggle — user-level theme preference
Multi-source support — Snowflake, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redshift, and more
publicApiSurface: GET /dashboard — main landing view after login
GET /assets — paginated asset catalog with search and type filters
GET /assets/:id — asset detail with Overview, Schema, Metrics, Lineage, Documentation tabs
GET /metrics — KPI cards (Data Quality %, Active Pipelines, System Uptime, Data Volume) and pipeline status
GET /alerts — alert list with severity cards (Critical, High, Warning, Info) and drift-status table
GET /issues — issue list with status workflow (New, In Progress, Resolved) and priority filtering
GET /analytics — query analytics (Total Queries, Query Success Rate, Avg Response Time, Active Users)
POST / (login) — email + password authentication with redirect-path preservation
ChatAssistant — natural-language queries for pipeline status, alerts, and asset health
